items.title: Amazon FBA Fees, Mid-2026: The Real Cost Math (Digital Applied)
items.note: Fetched + distilled. [policy]-grounded fee mythbust: only real Jul 1 2026 change = Canada prep/labelling ended (US ended Jan 1); NO $0.87/180-day storage overhaul (real rate $0.78/cu ft Jan-Sep, 181-day tier pre-existing); real H2 driver = Jan 15-16 overhaul (+$0.08 avg, new $0.60 inbound-defect, 456+ aged tier, FNSKU low-inventory) + Apr 17 3.5% fuel surcharge applied LAST; Q4 triple-stack up to $11.18/cu ft, 271-day aged cliff $5.45.

items.title: Amazon Featured Offer Overhaul: Rank-Only Buy Box Rules (Digital Applied)
items.note: Fetched + distilled. [policy] on Amazon's Jul 6 2026 Seller Forums announcement: standalone seller-performance eligibility gate for the Featured Offer removed; chargebacks/ODR/VOC become weighted inputs in ONE rank-only score. Phased rollout EU/UK Jul 20, global by EOY 2026, US unannounced; weights undisclosed. Knock-on: no Featured Offer = zero Sponsored-ad impressions (SKU-specific). On the can-it-profit/Buy-Box axis for OA; no ai-brain change.

items.title: Amazon FBA Cash Flow Management: Inventory Is Where the Cash Gets Quiet (The FBA Guys)
items.note: Fetched + distilled. [practitioner], n=8,503-valuation DB. Inventory ties up cash before the sale; growth widens the gap. Benchmarks: ~17% of sales in inventory; inventory-to-sales rises as turn speed falls (weeks 10.6% -> year+ 75.8%) and as sales decline. Reorder test 'what else has to wait?'; credit lines bridge timing but hide weak margin if abused; min system = 13-week cash forecast. Cash-discipline behind the ai-brain capital rules.

items.title: Amazon Fee Increases 2026: How to Protect Profit (Seller Labs)
items.note: Fetched + distilled. [practitioner] margin-defense companion to the fee breakdown: +$0.08/unit hits PROFIT not price (~5% of take-home at 10% margin); measure via Fee Preview CSV; tactics = trim <20%-buffer SKUs, shrink packaging 0.2in to drop a tier (N/A for OA), 2-3% price lift, reorder negotiation, margin alerts, file reimbursement claims monthly.
